# Knowhere - AI-Powered Knowledge Vault & Bookmark Manager

## Overview
Knowhere is a private, AI-powered knowledge vault designed to store links, videos, posts, articles, and notes with full context. It eliminates manual organization by utilizing Google's Gemini AI to automatically analyze, summarize, and categorize (tag) all incoming resources. 

## Key Unique Selling Points (USPs)
1. **Passwordless "Coords"**: Users log in securely using unique alphanumeric identifiers (e.g., AB-1234) rather than traditional passwords.
2. **Zero-Friction Collection & AI Tagging**: Users drop content into their inbox. AI automatically analyzes the content, generates summaries, identifies the source, and tags it appropriately.
3. **Intent-Based Missions**: Users can set 'Missions' (goals or objectives) for their saved content.
4. **V4 Intelligence Layer**: Knowhere isn't just a bookmark manager; it's an intelligence engine. It tracks the user's "Knowledge Activation Rate" (how often saved items become action) and tracks detailed intent/behavior metrics.
5. **Just-In-Time Surfacing**: Knowhere tracks your real-time searches and project creations to dynamically surface past discoveries exactly when they're relevant, curing digital hoarding.
6. **Tiered Anti-Procrastination Push Notifications**: Leveraging the intelligence layer, Knowhere sends uncompromising, intense Push Notifications to break procrastination habits, based on memory decay and missed opportunities.

## Target Audience
Individuals who consume high volumes of information (researchers, developers, designers, students) and suffer from "bookmark bankruptcy"—saving things but never reading them or organizing them. Knowhere's uncompromising intelligence engine forces users to confront their backlog and complete their missions.

## Technical Details
- Frontend: React, Vite, Framer Motion
- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB Atlas, Google Gemini API
- Push Notifications: Web Push API, Service Workers
